feature_and_bug_review.transcript: In UAT we already have password reset working. Create a follow-up story to add SMS reset and log a bug because the reset email link expires immediately.

contextSources.name: auth-notes.txt
contextSources.content: Current reset flow is email-only. SMS capability is planned but not built.

streamEvents.delta: {"type":"STORY","title":"Add SMS password reset","description":"As a returning user, I want to reset my password by SMS so recovery works without email.","criteria":[{"text":"Given a verified phone number, when user requests password reset, then system sends a one-time SMS code.","met":false}],"tempId":"S1"}

item.name: createWorkItem
item.arguments: {"type":"BUG","title":"Reset link expires immediately","description":"Users cannot finish reset because link is already expired.","stepsToReproduce":["Open reset email","Click reset link"],"expectedResult":"Link opens valid reset form.","actualResult":"Link displays expired token error."}

args.title: Add SMS password reset
args.description: As a returning user, I want to reset my password by SMS so recovery works without email.

criteria.text: Given a verified phone number, when user requests password reset, then system sends a one-time SMS code.

args.title: Reset link expires immediately
args.description: Users cannot finish reset because link is already expired.
